content: Gap hunting cycles 3 and 4 were notably fast (5 min and 15 min respectively) compared to cycles 1-2 (~19-31 min). When the gap count drops below 5, the hunters complete rapidly because their grep-based methodology scales with issue count, not system size. This suggests the factory could skip sequential hunter dispatch and run all 3 hunters in parallel for late-stage cycles.
sourceEvidence: Gap-cycle-3 timestamps: coverage-hunter 19:50 to gap-coordinator 19:55 = 5 min. Gap-cycle-4: coverage-hunter 20:58 to gap-coordinator 21:13 = 15 min. Vs gap-cycle-1: 07:16 to 07:35 = 19 min.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
